meaning: n.褰浆鏈夌ぜ,娈峰嫟,鏌旈『
examples: The public had shown complaisance , but it was certainly not yet taken by storm.
After my return to London I had to expiate in bed the consequences of my fatuous complaisance.
But, given their big neighbour's complaisance about Mexican waywardness, how long will that last?
One day they may come to rue their complaisance.
